outcomes.name: reconstructed_literal_wedge_no_projectile_video
outcomes.support: The current-source H.264 time-lapse contains 61 distinct validated frames from a 600-step exact DART trajectory and visibly retains the reconstructed 25-wedge arch.

outcomes.name: claim_boundary_excludes_paper_impact_video_segment
outcomes.support: This partial evidence item is explicitly out of scope for the clip: it has no projectile or external-solver panels and is not a reproduction of the paper video segment.
